sentence: Taylor Swift finally finished reading a book she had started over a year ago.
Among the things Dwayne Johnson cannot explain is why he always wakes up just before his alarm goes off.
The older Emma Watson gets, the more he appreciates a quiet evening at home.
Ryan Reynolds has been putting off a difficult conversation for longer than she cares to admit.
Without even realizing it, Serena Williams has developed a very specific way of loading the dishwasher.
Elon Musk spent a good ten minutes this week looking for something that was in her hand the whole time.
There is a song that, whenever Tom Hanks hears it, takes him straight back to a particular moment in his life.
Beyoncé Knowles has been genuinely unsure lately whether she is tired because of stress or just not drinking enough water.
Bradley Cooper keeps telling himself he will reorganize his desk, and keeps not doing it.
It occurred to Jennifer Lawrence recently that she has no memory of learning to ride a bike, yet she can still do it perfectly.
A checkout worker was unusually kind to Lionel Messi last Tuesday, and he is still thinking about it.
Steve Jobs has a drawer somewhere in her home that she avoids opening because of how chaotic it has become.
Whenever Rihanna Fenty has to parallel park with people watching, everything he knows about driving temporarily leaves his body.
Keanu Reeves recently came across a photo of herself from ten years ago and felt a complicated mix of emotions.
Something about the smell of rain hit Oprah Winfrey differently last week in a way he couldn't quite put into words.
Kanye West has strong opinions about the correct way to make tea, which not everyone appreciates.
The version of tomorrow that Michael Jordan imagined in his head was considerably more productive than the one that actually happened.
Meryl Streep has a habit of narrating small tasks to herself under her breath without noticing she is doing it.
Somewhere in Cristiano Ronaldo's phone is a note he wrote to himself at 2am that makes no sense to him now.
After years of swearing it would never happen, Warren Buffett has become her mother in at least three distinct and undeniable ways.
